channel.title: adb命令 on Creator
channel.description: Recent content in adb命令 on Creator

item.title: adb命令大全
item.description: Android Debug Bridge version 1.0.29 > -d – directs command to the only connected USB device > returns an error if more than one USB device is present. > -e – directs command to the only running emulator. > returns an error if more than one emulator is running. > -s – directs command to the USB device or emulator with > the given serial number. Overrides ANDROID_SERIAL environment variable.
